LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownedCorePlate.label: forge crowned core plate
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownedCorePlate.description: Bind a crowned core fragment into a dominion-grade torso shell. This pattern consumes one hell-slice fragment and rewrites it into wearable breach authority rather than another inert trophy.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownedCoreHelm.label: forge crowned core helm
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownedCoreHelm.description: Cut a crowned core fragment into a sealed dominion helm with reinforced halo braces and a crown-logic visor. The result is a late reward pattern for colonies that survived the hell slice and came back with proof.
